answers: Expat life challenges: culture shock, loneliness, language barriers, bureaucracy, and missing home. It gets easier with time.
Tips: learn the local language, join expat groups, explore your new city, stay connected with home, and be patient.
Benefits: personal growth, career opportunities, new perspectives, travel, and amazing life experiences.
Bidesh e jibon: prothome koshto hoy, kintu adjust hoye gele darun experience. Local culture shikho ar enjoy koro.
